Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(** Links signatures to lax morphisms in suitable actegories, by exploiting the already established link with action-based strength (in the non-whiskered setting)

Author: Ralph Matthes 2022

 *)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.PartD.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.NaturalTransformations.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Isos.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.FunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.whiskering.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.AlternativeDefinitions.MonoidalCategoriesTensored.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.PointedFunctorsMonoidal.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.Actions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.ConstructionOfActions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.ActionOfEndomorphismsInBicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.ActionBasedStrength.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.MonoidalFromBicategory.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.ActionBasedStrongFunctorCategory.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Examples.BicatOfCats.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Examples.EndofunctorsMonoidalElementary.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Actegories.Examples.ActionOfEndomorphismsInCATElementary.

Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.Signatures.

Require Import UniMath.SubstitutionSystems.ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Displayed.TotalMonoidal.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Actegories.Actegories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Actegories.MorphismsOfActegories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Actegories.ConstructionOfActegories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.coslicecat.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Monoidal.Examples.MonoidalPointedObjects.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.PointedFunctorsWhiskeredMonoidal.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.ActionOfEndomorphismsInBicatWhiskered.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.MonoidalCategories.BicatOfActegories.

Import Bicat.Notations.
Import MonoidalNotations.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section A.

 Context (C D D' : category).

 Local Definition Mon_endo' : MonoidalCategoriesTensored.monoidal_cat
   := swapping_of_monoidal_cat (monoidal_cat_of_pointedfunctors C).
 Local Definition domain_action : Actions.action Mon_endo' (hom(C:=bicat_of_cats) C D')
    := ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.ab_strength_domain_action(C:=bicat_of_cats) C D' (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.forget C).
 Local Definition target_action : Actions.action Mon_endo' (hom(C:=bicat_of_cats) C D)
    := ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.ab_strength_target_action(C:=bicat_of_cats) C D (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.forget C).

 
C, D, D': category
Signature C D D'
≃ actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
    (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C
       D')
    (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C
       D)

 
C, D, D': category
Signature C D D'
≃ actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
    (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C
       D')
    (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C
       D)

   
C, D, D': category
Signature C D D'
→ actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
    (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C
       D')
    (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C
       D)
C, D, D': category
actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
  (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C D')
  (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C D)
→ Signature C D D'
C, D, D': category
∏ x : Signature C D D', ?g (?f x) = x
C, D, D': category
∏
y : actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
      (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action
         C D')
      (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action
         C D), ?f (?g y) = y

   
C, D, D': category
Signature C D D'
→ actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
    (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C
       D')
    (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C
       D)
 apply ab_strong_functor_from_signature.
   
C, D, D': category
actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
  (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C D')
  (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C D)
→ Signature C D D'
 apply signature_from_strong_functor.
   
C, D, D': category
∏ x : Signature C D D',
signature_from_strong_functor C D D'
  (ab_strong_functor_from_signature C D D' x) = x
 apply roundtrip1_ob_as_equality.
   
C, D, D': category
∏
y : actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
      (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action
         C D')
      (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action
         C D),
ab_strong_functor_from_signature C D D'
  (signature_from_strong_functor C D D' y) = y
 apply roundtrip2_ob_as_equality.
 Defined.

(* Local Definition endo : category := [C,C]. would not be okay for convertibility *)
 Local Definition endofrombicat : category := ActionOfEndomorphismsInBicatWhiskered.endocat(C:=bicat_of_cats) C.
 Local Definition Mon_endo : monoidal endofrombicat := ActionOfEndomorphismsInBicatWhiskered.Mon_endo(C:=bicat_of_cats) C.
 Local Definition ptdendo : category := coslice_cat_total endofrombicat I_{Mon_endo}.
 Local Definition Mon_ptdendo : monoidal ptdendo
   := monoidal_pointed_objects Mon_endo.

 Local Definition actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors (E : category) : actegory Mon_ptdendo [C,E]
   := reindexed_actegory Mon_endo (actegoryfromprecomp C E) Mon_ptdendo
        (forget_monoidal_pointed_objects_monoidal Mon_endo).

 (* not possible without some transparent proofs
 Local Lemma actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors_as_actegory_with_canonical_pointed_action :
   actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors C = actegory_with_canonical_pointed_action Mon_endo.
 Proof.
   unfold actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors.
   unfold actegoryfromprecomp.
   rewrite actegory_from_precomp_as_self_action.
   apply idpath.
 Qed.
*)

 
C, D, D': category
actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors C =
actegory_with_canonical_pointed_action Mon_endo

 
C, D, D': category
actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors C =
actegory_with_canonical_pointed_action Mon_endo

   
C, D, D': category
pr1 (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors C) =
pr1 (actegory_with_canonical_pointed_action Mon_endo)
C, D, D': category
transportf WhiskeredBifunctors.is_bifunctor ?p
  (pr2 (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors C)) =
pr2 (actegory_with_canonical_pointed_action Mon_endo)

   
C, D, D': category
transportf WhiskeredBifunctors.is_bifunctor ?p
  (pr2 (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors C)) =
pr2 (actegory_with_canonical_pointed_action Mon_endo)
 apply WhiskeredBifunctors.isaprop_is_bifunctor. 
C, D, D': category
pr1 (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors C) =
pr1 (actegory_with_canonical_pointed_action Mon_endo)

   
C, D, D': category
reindexed_action_data Mon_endo
  (actegoryfromprecomp C C) =
reindexed_action_data Mon_endo
  (actegory_with_canonical_self_action Mon_endo)

   apply idpath.
 Qed. (* slow *)

 (*
 Local Lemma lax_lineators_from_reindexed_precomp_and_reindexed_self_action_agree (F : functor [C, C] [C, C]) :
   lineator_lax Mon_ptdendo (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors C) (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors C) F ≃
     lineator_lax Mon_ptdendo (actegory_with_canonical_pointed_action Mon_endo)
       (actegory_with_canonical_pointed_action Mon_endo) F.
 Proof.
   use weqfibtototal. (* not seen to terminate *)
 *)


 Section AA.

 Context (H : [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]).

 
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
F, F': C ⟶ D'
α: F ⟹ F'
β: F' ⟹ F
nat_trans_comp α β = nat_trans_id F
→ nat_trans_comp (# H α) (# H β) =
  nat_trans_id (pr1 (H F))

 
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
F, F': C ⟶ D'
α: F ⟹ F'
β: F' ⟹ F
nat_trans_comp α β = nat_trans_id F
→ nat_trans_comp (# H α) (# H β) =
  nat_trans_id (pr1 (H F))

   
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
F, F': C ⟶ D'
α: F ⟹ F'
β: F' ⟹ F
e: nat_trans_comp α β = nat_trans_id F
nat_trans_comp (# H α) (# H β) =
nat_trans_id (pr1 (H F))

   
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
F, F': C ⟶ D'
α: F ⟹ F'
β: F' ⟹ F
e: nat_trans_comp α β = nat_trans_id F
nat_trans_comp (# H α) (# H β) = # H (nat_trans_id F)
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
F, F': C ⟶ D'
α: F ⟹ F'
β: F' ⟹ F
e: nat_trans_comp α β = nat_trans_id F
# H (nat_trans_id F) = nat_trans_id (pr1 (H F))

   
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
F, F': C ⟶ D'
α: F ⟹ F'
β: F' ⟹ F
e: nat_trans_comp α β = nat_trans_id F
nat_trans_comp (# H α) (# H β) = # H (nat_trans_id F)
 
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
F, F': C ⟶ D'
α: F ⟹ F'
β: F' ⟹ F
e: nat_trans_comp α β = nat_trans_id F
nat_trans_comp (# H α) (# H β) =
# H (nat_trans_comp α β)

     
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
F, F': C ⟶ D'
α: F ⟹ F'
β: F' ⟹ F
e: nat_trans_comp α β = nat_trans_id F
# H α · # H β =
# H
  ((α : [C, D'] ⟦ F, F' ⟧) · (β : [C, D'] ⟦ F', F ⟧))

     apply (! functor_comp _ _ _).
   
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
F, F': C ⟶ D'
α: F ⟹ F'
β: F' ⟹ F
e: nat_trans_comp α β = nat_trans_id F
# H (nat_trans_id F) = nat_trans_id (pr1 (H F))
 
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
F, F': C ⟶ D'
α: F ⟹ F'
β: F' ⟹ F
e: nat_trans_comp α β = nat_trans_id F
nat_trans_id F = id₁ F

     apply idpath.
 Qed.

 
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
actionbased_strength Mon_endo'
  (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C D')
  (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C D)
  H
≃ lineator_lax Mon_ptdendo
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H

 
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
actionbased_strength Mon_endo'
  (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C D')
  (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C D)
  H
≃ lineator_lax Mon_ptdendo
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H

   
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
(∑
 ϛ : actionbased_strength_nat Mon_endo'
       (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action
          C D')
       (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action
          C D) H,
 actionbased_strength_triangle_eq Mon_endo'
   (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C
      D')
   (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C D)
   H ϛ
 × actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq Mon_endo'
     (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C
        D')
     (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C
        D) H ϛ)
≃ lineator_lax Mon_ptdendo
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H

   
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
(∑
 ϛ : actionbased_strength_dom Mon_endo'
       (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action
          C D) H
     ⟹ actionbased_strength_codom Mon_endo'
         (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action
            C D') H,
 actionbased_strength_triangle_eq Mon_endo'
   (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C
      D')
   (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C D)
   H ϛ
 × actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq Mon_endo'
     (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C
        D')
     (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C
        D) H ϛ)
≃ lineator_lax Mon_ptdendo
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H

   
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
(∑
 ϛ : ∑
     t : nat_trans_data
           (actionbased_strength_dom Mon_endo'
              (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action
                 C D) H)
           (actionbased_strength_codom Mon_endo'
              (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action
                 C D') H),
     is_nat_trans
       (actionbased_strength_dom Mon_endo'
          (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action
             C D) H)
       (actionbased_strength_codom Mon_endo'
          (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action
             C D') H) t,
 actionbased_strength_triangle_eq Mon_endo'
   (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C
      D')
   (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C D)
   H ϛ
 × actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq Mon_endo'
     (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C
        D')
     (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C
        D) H ϛ)
≃ lineator_lax Mon_ptdendo
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H

   
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
(∑
 ϛ : ∑
     t : nat_trans_data
           (actionbased_strength_dom Mon_endo'
              (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action
                 C D) H)
           (actionbased_strength_codom Mon_endo'
              (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action
                 C D') H),
     is_nat_trans
       (actionbased_strength_dom Mon_endo'
          (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action
             C D) H)
       (actionbased_strength_codom Mon_endo'
          (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action
             C D') H) t,
 actionbased_strength_triangle_eq Mon_endo'
   (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C
      D')
   (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C D)
   H ϛ
 × actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq Mon_endo'
     (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C
        D')
     (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C
        D) H ϛ) ≃ ?Y
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
?Y
≃ lineator_lax Mon_ptdendo
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H

   
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
(∑
 ϛ : ∑
     t : nat_trans_data
           (actionbased_strength_dom Mon_endo'
              (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action
                 C D) H)
           (actionbased_strength_codom Mon_endo'
              (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action
                 C D') H),
     is_nat_trans
       (actionbased_strength_dom Mon_endo'
          (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action
             C D) H)
       (actionbased_strength_codom Mon_endo'
          (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action
             C D') H) t,
 actionbased_strength_triangle_eq Mon_endo'
   (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C
      D')
   (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C D)
   H ϛ
 × actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq Mon_endo'
     (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C
        D')
     (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C
        D) H ϛ) ≃ ?Y
 apply weqtotal2asstor. 
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
(∑
 (x : nat_trans_data
        (actionbased_strength_dom Mon_endo'
           (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action
              C D) H)
        (actionbased_strength_codom Mon_endo'
           (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action
              C D') H))
 (p : (λ t : nat_trans_data
               (actionbased_strength_dom Mon_endo'
                  (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action
                     C D) H)
               (actionbased_strength_codom Mon_endo'
                  (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action
                     C D') H),
       is_nat_trans
         (actionbased_strength_dom Mon_endo'
            (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action
               C D) H)
         (actionbased_strength_codom Mon_endo'
            (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action
               C D') H) t) x),
 (λ ϛ : ∑
        t : nat_trans_data
              (actionbased_strength_dom Mon_endo'
                 (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action
                    C D) H)
              (actionbased_strength_codom Mon_endo'
                 (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action
                    C D') H),
        is_nat_trans
          (actionbased_strength_dom Mon_endo'
             (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action
                C D) H)
          (actionbased_strength_codom Mon_endo'
             (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action
                C D') H) t,
  actionbased_strength_triangle_eq Mon_endo'
    (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C
       D')
    (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C
       D) H ϛ
  × actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq Mon_endo'
      (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action
         C D')
      (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action
         C D) H ϛ) (x,, p))
≃ lineator_lax Mon_ptdendo
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H

(*
   set (P := is_nat_trans (actionbased_strength_dom Mon_endo' (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C D) H)
               (actionbased_strength_codom Mon_endo' (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C D') H)).
   set (Q := fun (ζ: actionbased_strength_nat Mon_endo' (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C D')
         (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C D) H) => actionbased_strength_triangle_eq Mon_endo' (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C D')
     (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C D) H ζ
   × actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq Mon_endo' (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C D')
   (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C D) H ζ).
   (* a test for speeding up - not very successful (one would then use [Q'] in place of [Q] in the invocation of [weqtotal2asstor]):
      set (Q' := fun ζ: ∑ t: nat_trans_data (actionbased_strength_dom Mon_endo' (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C D) H)
                            (actionbased_strength_codom Mon_endo' (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C D') H),
                    is_nat_trans (actionbased_strength_dom Mon_endo' (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C D) H)
             (actionbased_strength_codom Mon_endo' (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C D') H) t  => Q ζ). *)
   exact (weqtotal2asstor P Q).
*)
   
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
(∑
 (x : nat_trans_data
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data H
              (functor_identity
                 (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data
                    C)))
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data
                 (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
                 (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (bindelta_functor_data
                       (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
                    (pair_functor_data
                       (pr2_functor (hom C D)
                          (hom C C))
                       (pr1_functor (hom C D)
                          (hom C C))))
                 hcomp_functor_data)))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data
                 (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
                 (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (bindelta_functor_data
                       (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
                    (pair_functor_data
                       (pr2_functor (hom C D')
                          (hom C C))
                       (pr1_functor (hom C D')
                          (hom C C))))
                 hcomp_functor_data)) H))
 (p : is_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data H
              (functor_identity
                 (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data
                    C)))
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data
                 (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
                 (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (bindelta_functor_data
                       (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
                    (pair_functor_data
                       (pr2_functor (hom C D)
                          (hom C C))
                       (pr1_functor (hom C D)
                          (hom C C))))
                 hcomp_functor_data)))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data
                 (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
                 (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (bindelta_functor_data
                       (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
                    (pair_functor_data
                       (pr2_functor (hom C D')
                          (hom C C))
                       (pr1_functor (hom C D')
                          (hom C C))))
                 hcomp_functor_data)) H) x),
 actionbased_strength_triangle_eq Mon_endo'
   (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C
      D')
   (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C D)
   H (x,, p)
 × actionbased_strength_pentagon_eq Mon_endo'
     (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C
        D')
     (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C
        D) H (x,, p))
≃ lineator_lax Mon_ptdendo
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H

   
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
(∑
 (x : nat_trans_data
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data H
              (functor_identity
                 (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data
                    C)))
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data
                 (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
                 (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (bindelta_functor_data
                       (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
                    (pair_functor_data
                       (pr2_functor (hom C D)
                          (hom C C))
                       (pr1_functor (hom C D)
                          (hom C C))))
                 hcomp_functor_data)))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data
                 (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
                 (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (bindelta_functor_data
                       (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
                    (pair_functor_data
                       (pr2_functor (hom C D')
                          (hom C C))
                       (pr1_functor (hom C D')
                          (hom C C))))
                 hcomp_functor_data)) H))
 (p : is_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data H
              (functor_identity
                 (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data
                    C)))
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data
                 (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
                 (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (bindelta_functor_data
                       (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
                    (pair_functor_data
                       (pr2_functor (hom C D)
                          (hom C C))
                       (pr1_functor (hom C D)
                          (hom C C))))
                 hcomp_functor_data)))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data
                 (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
                 (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (bindelta_functor_data
                       (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
                    (pair_functor_data
                       (pr2_functor (hom C D')
                          (hom C C))
                       (pr1_functor (hom C D')
                          (hom C C))))
                 hcomp_functor_data)) H) x),
 (∏ a : hom C D',
  (x,, p) (a, ActionBasedStrength.I Mon_endo')
  · # H
      (ActionBasedStrength.ϱ Mon_endo'
         (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action
            C D') a) =
  ActionBasedStrength.ϱ' Mon_endo'
    (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C
       D) (H a))
 × (∏ (a : hom C D') (v w : Mon_endo'),
    ActionBasedStrength.χ' Mon_endo'
      (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action
         C D) ((H a, v), w)
    · (x,, p)
        (a,
        ActionBasedStrength.tensor Mon_endo' (v,, w)) =
    # (act_odot
         (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action
            C D)) ((x,, p) (a, v) #, id₁ w)
    · (x,, p)
        (act_odot
           (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action
              C D') (a, v), w)
    · # H
        (ActionBasedStrength.χ Mon_endo'
           (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action
              C D') ((a, v), w))))
≃ lineator_lax Mon_ptdendo
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H

   
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
(∑
 (x : nat_trans_data
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data H
              (functor_identity
                 (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data
                    C)))
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data
                 (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
                 (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (bindelta_functor_data
                       (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
                    (pair_functor_data
                       (pr2_functor (hom C D)
                          (hom C C))
                       (pr1_functor (hom C D)
                          (hom C C))))
                 hcomp_functor_data)))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data
                 (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
                 (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (bindelta_functor_data
                       (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
                    (pair_functor_data
                       (pr2_functor (hom C D')
                          (hom C C))
                       (pr1_functor (hom C D')
                          (hom C C))))
                 hcomp_functor_data)) H))
 (_ : is_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data H
              (functor_identity
                 (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data
                    C)))
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data
                 (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
                 (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (bindelta_functor_data
                       (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
                    (pair_functor_data
                       (pr2_functor (hom C D)
                          (hom C C))
                       (pr1_functor (hom C D)
                          (hom C C))))
                 hcomp_functor_data)))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data
                 (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
                 (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (bindelta_functor_data
                       (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
                    (pair_functor_data
                       (pr2_functor (hom C D')
                          (hom C C))
                       (pr1_functor (hom C D')
                          (hom C C))))
                 hcomp_functor_data)) H) x),
 (∏ a : C ⟶ D',
  nat_trans_comp (x (a, PointedFunctors.id_Ptd C))
    (# H
       (nat_trans_comp
          (nat_trans_comp
             (post_whisker
                (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
                   (make_nat_z_iso
                      (functor_identity C)
                      (functor_identity C)
                      (nat_trans_id
                         (functor_identity_data C))
                      (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                         (functor_identity_data C))))
                a)
             (pre_whisker (functor_identity_data C)
                (nat_trans_id a))) (nat_trans_id a))) =
  nat_trans_comp
    (nat_trans_comp
       (post_whisker
          (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
             (make_nat_z_iso (functor_identity C)
                (functor_identity C)
                (nat_trans_id
                   (functor_identity_data C))
                (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                   (functor_identity_data C)))) (H a))
       (pre_whisker (functor_identity_data C)
          (nat_trans_id (H a)))) (nat_trans_id (H a)))
 × (∏ (a : C ⟶ D') (v w : PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C),
    nat_trans_comp
      (nat_trans_comp
         (nat_trans_id
            (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
               (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (H a))))
         (nat_trans_comp
            (post_whisker
               (nat_trans_id
                  (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                     (pr1 v))) (H a))
            (pre_whisker
               (functor_composite_data (pr1 w) (pr1 v))
               (nat_trans_id (H a)))))
      (x
         (a,
         PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C w v)) =
    nat_trans_comp
      (nat_trans_comp
         (nat_trans_comp
            (post_whisker
               (nat_trans_id
                  (PointedFunctors.functor_from_ptd_obj
                     C w)) (pr1 v ∙ H a))
            (pre_whisker (pr1 w) (x (a, v))))
         (x (pr1 v ∙ a, w)))
      (# H
         (nat_trans_comp
            (nat_trans_id
               (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                  (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) a)))
            (nat_trans_comp
               (post_whisker
                  (nat_trans_id
                     (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                        (pr1 v))) a)
               (pre_whisker
                  (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                     (pr1 v)) (nat_trans_id a)))))))
≃ lineator_lax Mon_ptdendo
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H

   
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
(∑
 (x : nat_trans_data
        (functor_composite_data

                          (hom C C))

                          (hom C C))))

        (functor_composite_data

                 (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
              (functor_composite_data

                    (pair_functor_data

                          (hom C C))

                          (hom C C))))

 (_ : is_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data H

                 (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data
                    C)))
           (functor_composite_data

                 (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
                 (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (bindelta_functor_data
                       (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
                    (pair_functor_data
                       (pr2_functor (hom C D)
                          (hom C C))
                       (pr1_functor (hom C D)
                          (hom C C))))
                 hcomp_functor_data)))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data
                 (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
                 (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (bindelta_functor_data
                       (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
                    (pair_functor_data
                       (pr2_functor (hom C D')
                          (hom C C))
                       (pr1_functor (hom C D')
                          (hom C C))))
                 hcomp_functor_data)) H) x),
 (∏ a : C ⟶ D',
  nat_trans_comp (x (a, PointedFunctors.id_Ptd C))
    (# H
       (nat_trans_comp
          (nat_trans_comp
             (post_whisker
                (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
                   (make_nat_z_iso
                      (functor_identity C)
                      (functor_identity C)
                      (nat_trans_id
                         (functor_identity_data C))
                      (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                         (functor_identity_data C))))
                a)
             (pre_whisker (functor_identity_data C)
                (nat_trans_id a))) (nat_trans_id a))) =
  nat_trans_comp
    (nat_trans_comp
       (post_whisker
          (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
             (make_nat_z_iso (functor_identity C)
                (functor_identity C)
                (nat_trans_id
                   (functor_identity_data C))
                (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                   (functor_identity_data C)))) (H a))
       (pre_whisker (functor_identity_data C)
          (nat_trans_id (H a)))) (nat_trans_id (H a)))
 × (∏ (a : C ⟶ D') (v w : PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C),
    nat_trans_comp
      (nat_trans_comp
         (nat_trans_id
            (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
               (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (H a))))
         (nat_trans_comp
            (post_whisker
               (nat_trans_id
                  (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                     (pr1 v))) (H a))
            (pre_whisker
               (functor_composite_data (pr1 w) (pr1 v))
               (nat_trans_id (H a)))))
      (x
         (a,
         PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C w v)) =
    nat_trans_comp
      (nat_trans_comp
         (nat_trans_comp
            (post_whisker
               (nat_trans_id
                  (PointedFunctors.functor_from_ptd_obj
                     C w)) (pr1 v ∙ H a))
            (pre_whisker (pr1 w) (x (a, v))))
         (x (pr1 v ∙ a, w)))

         (nat_trans_comp
            (nat_trans_id
               (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                  (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) a)))
            (nat_trans_comp
               (post_whisker
                  (nat_trans_id
                     (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                        (pr1 v))) a)
               (pre_whisker
                  (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                     (pr1 v)) (nat_trans_id a)))))))
≃ (∑
   ld : lineator_data Mon_ptdendo
          (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
          (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H,
   lineator_laxlaws Mon_ptdendo
     (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
     (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H ld)

H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data

              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)

    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')

C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
∏
x : nat_trans_data
      (functor_composite_data
         (pair_functor_data H
            (functor_identity
               (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
         (functor_composite_data
            (pair_functor_data
               (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
               (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
            (functor_composite_data
               (functor_composite_data
                  (bindelta_functor_data
                     (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
                  (pair_functor_data
                     (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                     (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
               hcomp_functor_data)))
      (functor_composite_data
         (functor_composite_data
            (pair_functor_data
               (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
               (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
            (functor_composite_data
               (functor_composite_data
                  (bindelta_functor_data
                     (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
                  (pair_functor_data
                     (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                     (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
               hcomp_functor_data)) H),
(λ x0 : nat_trans_data
          (functor_composite_data
             (pair_functor_data H
                (functor_identity
                   (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data
                      C)))
             (functor_composite_data
                (pair_functor_data
                   (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
                   (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
                (functor_composite_data
                   (functor_composite_data
                      (bindelta_functor_data
                         (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
                      (pair_functor_data
                         (pr2_functor (hom C D)
                            (hom C C))
                         (pr1_functor (hom C D)
                            (hom C C))))
                   hcomp_functor_data)))
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data
                (pair_functor_data
                   (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
                   (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
                (functor_composite_data
                   (functor_composite_data
                      (bindelta_functor_data
                         (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
                      (pair_functor_data
                         (pr2_functor (hom C D')
                            (hom C C))
                         (pr1_functor (hom C D')
                            (hom C C))))
                   hcomp_functor_data)) H),
 ∑
 _ : is_nat_trans
       (functor_composite_data
          (pair_functor_data H
             (functor_identity
                (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data
                   C)))
          (functor_composite_data
             (pair_functor_data
                (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
                (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_composite_data
                   (bindelta_functor_data
                      (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
                   (pair_functor_data
                      (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                      (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
                hcomp_functor_data)))
       (functor_composite_data
          (functor_composite_data
             (pair_functor_data
                (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
                (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_composite_data
                   (bindelta_functor_data
                      (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
                   (pair_functor_data
                      (pr2_functor (hom C D')
                         (hom C C))
                      (pr1_functor (hom C D')
                         (hom C C))))
                hcomp_functor_data)) H) x0,
 (∏ a : C ⟶ D',
  nat_trans_comp (x0 (a, PointedFunctors.id_Ptd C))
    (# H
       (nat_trans_comp
          (nat_trans_comp
             (post_whisker
                (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
                   (make_nat_z_iso
                      (functor_identity C)
                      (functor_identity C)
                      (nat_trans_id
                         (functor_identity_data C))
                      (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                         (functor_identity_data C))))
                a)
             (pre_whisker (functor_identity_data C)
                (nat_trans_id a))) (nat_trans_id a))) =
  nat_trans_comp
    (nat_trans_comp
       (post_whisker
          (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
             (make_nat_z_iso (functor_identity C)
                (functor_identity C)
                (nat_trans_id
                   (functor_identity_data C))
                (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                   (functor_identity_data C)))) (H a))
       (pre_whisker (functor_identity_data C)
          (nat_trans_id (H a)))) (nat_trans_id (H a)))
 × (∏ (a : C ⟶ D') (v w : PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C),
    nat_trans_comp
      (nat_trans_comp
         (nat_trans_id
            (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
               (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (H a))))
         (nat_trans_comp
            (post_whisker
               (nat_trans_id
                  (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                     (pr1 v))) (H a))
            (pre_whisker
               (functor_composite_data (pr1 w) (pr1 v))
               (nat_trans_id (H a)))))
      (x0
         (a,
         PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C w v)) =
    nat_trans_comp
      (nat_trans_comp
         (nat_trans_comp
            (post_whisker
               (nat_trans_id
                  (PointedFunctors.functor_from_ptd_obj
                     C w)) (pr1 v ∙ H a))
            (pre_whisker (pr1 w) (x0 (a, v))))
         (x0 (pr1 v ∙ a, w)))
      (# H
         (nat_trans_comp
            (nat_trans_id
               (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                  (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) a)))
            (nat_trans_comp
               (post_whisker
                  (nat_trans_id
                     (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                        (pr1 v))) a)
               (pre_whisker
                  (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                     (pr1 v)) (nat_trans_id a))))))) x
≃ lineator_laxlaws Mon_ptdendo
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H (?w x)

nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data

C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))

                   (pair_functor_data
                      (pr2_functor (hom C D')
                         (hom C C))
                      (pr1_functor (hom C D')
                         (hom C C))))
                hcomp_functor_data)) H) x,
 (∏ a : C ⟶ D',
  nat_trans_comp (x (a, PointedFunctors.id_Ptd C))
    (# H
       (nat_trans_comp
          (nat_trans_comp
             (post_whisker
                (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
                   (make_nat_z_iso
                      (functor_identity C)
                      (functor_identity C)
                      (nat_trans_id
                         (functor_identity_data C))
                      (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                         (functor_identity_data C))))
                a)
             (pre_whisker (functor_identity_data C)
                (nat_trans_id a))) (nat_trans_id a))) =
  nat_trans_comp
    (nat_trans_comp
       (post_whisker
          (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv

                (functor_identity C)
                (nat_trans_id
                   (functor_identity_data C))
                (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                   (functor_identity_data C)))) (H a))
       (pre_whisker (functor_identity_data C)
          (nat_trans_id (H a)))) (nat_trans_id (H a)))
 × (∏ (a : C ⟶ D') (v w : PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C),
    nat_trans_comp
      (nat_trans_comp
         (nat_trans_id
            (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
               (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (H a))))
         (nat_trans_comp

               (nat_trans_id
                  (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                     (pr1 v))) (H a))
            (pre_whisker

      (x
         (a,
         PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C w v)) =
    nat_trans_comp

            (post_whisker
               (nat_trans_id
                  (PointedFunctors.functor_from_ptd_obj

         (nat_trans_comp

                     (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)

                     (pr1 v)) (nat_trans_id a))))))) γ
≃ lineator_laxlaws Mon_ptdendo
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')

       (λ α : nat_trans_data

                         (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))

                                  (hom C C))
                               (pr1_functor (hom C D')
                                  (hom C C))))

       (λ β : lineator_data Mon_ptdendo

                (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H,
        (λ fv : precategory_binproduct_ob_mor

       (λ α : nat_trans_data

                    (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))

          ((λ α0 : nat_trans_data

                (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')

        idpath

C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data

              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)
(∑
 _ : is_nat_trans
       (functor_composite_data
          (pair_functor_data H
             (functor_identity
                (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data
                   C)))
          (functor_composite_data

                         (hom C C))

                         (hom C C))))

 (∏ a : C ⟶ D',
  nat_trans_comp (γ (a, PointedFunctors.id_Ptd C))
    (# H
       (nat_trans_comp
          (nat_trans_comp
             (post_whisker
                (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv

                      (functor_identity C)

    (nat_trans_comp

                (nat_trans_id

 × (∏ (a : C ⟶ D') (v w : PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C),
    nat_trans_comp
      (nat_trans_comp
         (nat_trans_id
            (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)

            (nat_trans_comp

≃ lineator_laxlaws Mon_ptdendo
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H
    (λ (v : ∑ x : C ⟶ C, functor_identity_data C ⟹ x)
     (f : C ⟶ D'), γ (f,, v))

H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data

                     (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                        (pr1 v))) a)
               (pre_whisker
                  (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                     (pr1 v)) (nat_trans_id a)))))))
→ lineator_laxlaws Mon_ptdendo
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H
    (λ (v : ∑ x : C ⟶ C, functor_identity_data C ⟹ x)
     (f : C ⟶ D'), γ (f,, v))
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)
lineator_laxlaws Mon_ptdendo
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H
  (λ (v : ∑ x : C ⟶ C, functor_identity_data C ⟹ x)
   (f : C ⟶ D'), γ (f,, v))
→ ∑
  _ : is_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data H
              (functor_identity
                 (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data
                    C)))
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data
                 (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
                 (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (bindelta_functor_data
                       (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
                    (pair_functor_data
                       (pr2_functor (hom C D)
                          (hom C C))
                       (pr1_functor (hom C D)
                          (hom C C))))
                 hcomp_functor_data)))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data
                 (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
                 (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (bindelta_functor_data
                       (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
                    (pair_functor_data
                       (pr2_functor (hom C D')
                          (hom C C))
                       (pr1_functor (hom C D')
                          (hom C C))))
                 hcomp_functor_data)) H) γ,
  (∏ a : C ⟶ D',
   nat_trans_comp (γ (a, PointedFunctors.id_Ptd C))
     (# H
        (nat_trans_comp
           (nat_trans_comp
              (post_whisker
                 (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
                    (make_nat_z_iso
                       (functor_identity C)
                       (functor_identity C)
                       (nat_trans_id
                          (functor_identity_data C))
                       (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                          (functor_identity_data C))))
                 a)
              (pre_whisker (functor_identity_data C)
                 (nat_trans_id a))) (nat_trans_id a))) =
   nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
              (make_nat_z_iso (functor_identity C)
                 (functor_identity C)
                 (nat_trans_id
                    (functor_identity_data C))
                 (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                    (functor_identity_data C)))) (H a))
        (pre_whisker (functor_identity_data C)
           (nat_trans_id (H a)))) (nat_trans_id (H a)))
  × (∏ (a : C ⟶ D') (v w : PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C),
     nat_trans_comp
       (nat_trans_comp
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (H a))))
          (nat_trans_comp
             (post_whisker
                (nat_trans_id
                   (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                      (pr1 v))) (H a))
             (pre_whisker
                (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                   (pr1 v)) (nat_trans_id (H a)))))
       (γ
          (a,
          PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C w v)) =
     nat_trans_comp
       (nat_trans_comp
          (nat_trans_comp
             (post_whisker
                (nat_trans_id
                   (PointedFunctors.functor_from_ptd_obj
                      C w)) (pr1 v ∙ H a))
             (pre_whisker (pr1 w) (γ (a, v))))
          (γ (pr1 v ∙ a, w)))
       (# H
          (nat_trans_comp
             (nat_trans_id
                (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                   (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) a)))
             (nat_trans_comp
                (post_whisker
                   (nat_trans_id
                      (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                         (pr1 v))) a)
                (pre_whisker
                   (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                      (pr1 v)) (nat_trans_id a))))))

H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data

isaprop
  (∑
   _ : is_nat_trans
         (functor_composite_data
            (pair_functor_data H
               (functor_identity
                  (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data
                     C)))
            (functor_composite_data
               (pair_functor_data
                  (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
                  (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
               (functor_composite_data

                        (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
                     (pair_functor_data
                        (pr2_functor (hom C D)
                           (hom C C))
                        (pr1_functor (hom C D)
                           (hom C C))))
                  hcomp_functor_data)))
         (functor_composite_data
            (functor_composite_data
               (pair_functor_data
                  (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
                  (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
               (functor_composite_data
                  (functor_composite_data

                     (pair_functor_data
                        (pr2_functor (hom C D')
                           (hom C C))
                        (pr1_functor (hom C D')
                           (hom C C))))
                  hcomp_functor_data)) H) γ,
   (∏ a : C ⟶ D',
    nat_trans_comp (γ (a, PointedFunctors.id_Ptd C))
      (# H
         (nat_trans_comp
            (nat_trans_comp
               (post_whisker
                  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
                     (make_nat_z_iso
                        (functor_identity C)
                        (functor_identity C)
                        (nat_trans_id
                           (functor_identity_data C))
                        (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                           (functor_identity_data C))))
                  a)
               (pre_whisker (functor_identity_data C)
                  (nat_trans_id a))) (nat_trans_id a))) =
    nat_trans_comp
      (nat_trans_comp
         (post_whisker
            (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
               (make_nat_z_iso (functor_identity C)
                  (functor_identity C)
                  (nat_trans_id
                     (functor_identity_data C))
                  (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                     (functor_identity_data C))))
            (H a))
         (pre_whisker (functor_identity_data C)
            (nat_trans_id (H a))))
      (nat_trans_id (H a)))
   × (∏ (a : C ⟶ D')
      (v w : PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C),
      nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_comp
           (nat_trans_id
              (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                 (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (H a))))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (post_whisker
                 (nat_trans_id
                    (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                       (pr1 v))) (H a))
              (pre_whisker
                 (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                    (pr1 v)) (nat_trans_id (H a)))))
        (γ
           (a,
           PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C w
             v)) =
      nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_comp
           (nat_trans_comp
              (post_whisker
                 (nat_trans_id
                    (PointedFunctors.functor_from_ptd_obj
                       C w)) (pr1 v ∙ H a))
              (pre_whisker (pr1 w) (γ (a, v))))
           (γ (pr1 v ∙ a, w)))
        (# H
           (nat_trans_comp
              (nat_trans_id
                 (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                    (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) a)))
              (nat_trans_comp
                 (post_whisker
                    (nat_trans_id
                       (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                          (pr1 v))) a)
                 (pre_whisker
                    (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                       (pr1 v)) (nat_trans_id a)))))))

                (post_whisker

                      (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                         (pr1 v))) a)
                (pre_whisker
                   (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                      (pr1 v)) (nat_trans_id a))))))
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)
isaprop
  (∑
   _ : is_nat_trans
         (functor_composite_data
            (pair_functor_data H
               (functor_identity
                  (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data
                     C)))
            (functor_composite_data
               (pair_functor_data
                  (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
                  (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
               (functor_composite_data
                  (functor_composite_data
                     (bindelta_functor_data
                        (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
                     (pair_functor_data
                        (pr2_functor (hom C D)
                           (hom C C))
                        (pr1_functor (hom C D)
                           (hom C C))))
                  hcomp_functor_data)))
         (functor_composite_data
            (functor_composite_data
               (pair_functor_data
                  (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
                  (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
               (functor_composite_data
                  (functor_composite_data
                     (bindelta_functor_data
                        (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
                     (pair_functor_data
                        (pr2_functor (hom C D')
                           (hom C C))
                        (pr1_functor (hom C D')
                           (hom C C))))
                  hcomp_functor_data)) H) γ,
   (∏ a : C ⟶ D',
    nat_trans_comp (γ (a, PointedFunctors.id_Ptd C))
      (# H
         (nat_trans_comp
            (nat_trans_comp
               (post_whisker
                  (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
                     (make_nat_z_iso
                        (functor_identity C)
                        (functor_identity C)
                        (nat_trans_id
                           (functor_identity_data C))
                        (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                           (functor_identity_data C))))
                  a)
               (pre_whisker (functor_identity_data C)
                  (nat_trans_id a))) (nat_trans_id a))) =
    nat_trans_comp
      (nat_trans_comp
         (post_whisker
            (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
               (make_nat_z_iso (functor_identity C)
                  (functor_identity C)
                  (nat_trans_id
                     (functor_identity_data C))
                  (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                     (functor_identity_data C))))
            (H a))
         (pre_whisker (functor_identity_data C)
            (nat_trans_id (H a))))
      (nat_trans_id (H a)))
   × (∏ (a : C ⟶ D')
      (v w : PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C),
      nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_comp
           (nat_trans_id
              (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                 (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (H a))))
           (nat_trans_comp
              (post_whisker
                 (nat_trans_id
                    (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                       (pr1 v))) (H a))
              (pre_whisker
                 (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                    (pr1 v)) (nat_trans_id (H a)))))
        (γ
           (a,
           PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C w
             v)) =
      nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_comp
           (nat_trans_comp
              (post_whisker
                 (nat_trans_id
                    (PointedFunctors.functor_from_ptd_obj
                       C w)) (pr1 v ∙ H a))
              (pre_whisker (pr1 w) (γ (a, v))))
           (γ (pr1 v ∙ a, w)))
        (# H
           (nat_trans_comp
              (nat_trans_id
                 (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                    (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) a)))
              (nat_trans_comp
                 (post_whisker
                    (nat_trans_id
                       (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                          (pr1 v))) a)
                 (pre_whisker
                    (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                       (pr1 v)) (nat_trans_id a)))))))

     (post_whisker (pr12 f) (H (pr1 x)))
     (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (# H (pr1 f))))
  (γ x') =
nat_trans_comp (γ x)
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker (pr12 f) (pr1 x))
        (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (pr1 f))))
Hyptriangle: ∏ a : C ⟶ D',
nat_trans_comp
  (γ (a, PointedFunctors.id_Ptd C))
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker

(v w : PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data 
           (pr1 w)

              (pr1 v) (H a))))
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_trans_id
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 w) 
                 (pr1 v))) 
           (H a))
        (pre_whisker
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 w) (pr1 v))
           (nat_trans_id (H a)))))
  (γ
     (a,
     PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose
       C w v)) =

     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_trans_id
              (PointedFunctors.functor_from_ptd_obj

     (γ (pr1 v ∙ a, w)))

     (nat_trans_comp

              (pr1 w)
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 v) a)))
        (nat_trans_comp

              (nat_trans_id

                    (pr1 w) 
                    (pr1 v))) a)
           (pre_whisker

                 (pr1 w) 
                 (pr1 v))
              (nat_trans_id a)))))

  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')

C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)

  (nat_trans_comp

  (γ x') =
nat_trans_comp (γ x)
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker (pr12 f) (pr1 x))
        (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (pr1 f))))

H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data

              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))

C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)

(f : precategory_binproduct_mor

       (PointedFunctors.ptd_ob_mor C) x x'),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (pr12 f) (H (pr1 x)))

  (γ x') =

        (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (pr1 f))))

nat_trans_comp

  (# H

              (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
                 (make_nat_z_iso
                    (functor_identity C)
                    (functor_identity C)
                    (nat_trans_id

        (nat_trans_id (H a))))
  (nat_trans_id (H a))

C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)

  (γ x') =

        (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (pr1 f))))

nat_trans_comp
  (γ (a, PointedFunctors.id_Ptd C))
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker
              (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
                 (make_nat_z_iso
                    (functor_identity C)
                    (functor_identity C)
                    (nat_trans_id

(v w : PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data 
           (pr1 w)

              (pr1 v) (H a))))

v: ptdendo
f1, f2: [C, D']
β: [C, D'] ⟦ f1, f2 ⟧
WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) v (H f1) (H f2)
  (# H β) · γ (f2,, v) =
γ (f1,, v)
· # H
    (WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
       (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D') v f1 f2 β)

         
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)

        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)
Hypnat: ∏ (x x' : C ⟶ D' × PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C)
(f : precategory_binproduct_mor
       (hom_ob_mor C D')
       (PointedFunctors.ptd_ob_mor C) x x'),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (pr12 f) (H (pr1 x)))
     (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (# H (pr1 f))))
  (γ x') =
nat_trans_comp (γ x)
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker (pr12 f) (pr1 x))
        (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (pr1 f))))
Hyptriangle: ∏ a : C ⟶ D',
nat_trans_comp
  (γ (a, PointedFunctors.id_Ptd C))
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker
              (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
                 (make_nat_z_iso
                    (functor_identity C)
                    (functor_identity C)
                    (nat_trans_id
                       (functor_identity_data
                       C))
                    (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                       (functor_identity_data
                       C)))) a)
           (pre_whisker
              (functor_identity_data C)
              (nat_trans_id a)))
        (nat_trans_id a))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker
        (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
           (make_nat_z_iso
              (functor_identity C)
              (functor_identity C)
              (nat_trans_id
                 (functor_identity_data
                    C))
              (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                 (functor_identity_data
                    C)))) 
        (H a))
     (pre_whisker
        (functor_identity_data C)
        (nat_trans_id (H a))))
  (nat_trans_id (H a))
Hyppentagon: ∏ (a : C ⟶ D')
(v w : PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data 
           (pr1 w)
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 v) (H a))))
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_trans_id
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 w) 
                 (pr1 v))) 
           (H a))
        (pre_whisker
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 w) (pr1 v))
           (nat_trans_id (H a)))))
  (γ
     (a,
     PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose
       C w v)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_trans_id
              (PointedFunctors.functor_from_ptd_obj
                 C w)) (pr1 v ∙ H a))
        (pre_whisker (pr1 w) (γ (a, v))))
     (γ (pr1 v ∙ a, w)))
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 w)
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 v) a)))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker
              (nat_trans_id
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (pr1 w) 
                    (pr1 v))) a)
           (pre_whisker
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 w) 
                 (pr1 v))
              (nat_trans_id a)))))

x: C

γ (f1,, v) x · # H (pre_whisker (pr1 v) β) x

nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data 
           (pr1 w)
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 v) (H a))))
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_trans_id
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 w) 
                 (pr1 v))) 
           (H a))
        (pre_whisker
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 w) (pr1 v))
           (nat_trans_id (H a)))))
  (γ
     (a,
     PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose
       C w v)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_trans_id
              (PointedFunctors.functor_from_ptd_obj
                 C w)) (pr1 v ∙ H a))
        (pre_whisker (pr1 w) (γ (a, v))))
     (γ (pr1 v ∙ a, w)))
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 w)
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 v) a)))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker
              (nat_trans_id
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (pr1 w) 
                    (pr1 v))) a)
           (pre_whisker
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 w) 
                 (pr1 v))
              (nat_trans_id a)))))
v: ptdendo
f1, f2: [C, D']
β: [C, D'] ⟦ f1, f2 ⟧
x: C
Hypnatinst: pr1 (# H β) (pr1 (pr1 v) x)
· γ (f2,, v) x =
γ (f1,, v) x
· # H
    (nat_trans_comp
       (nat_trans_id
          (functor_composite_data
             (PointedFunctors.functor_from_ptd_obj
                C v) f1))
       (pre_whisker (pr1 v) β)) x
pr1 (# H β) (pr1 (pr1 v) x) · γ (f2,, v) x = ?b
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)
Hypnat: ∏ (x x' : C ⟶ D' × PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C)
(f : precategory_binproduct_mor
       (hom_ob_mor C D')
       (PointedFunctors.ptd_ob_mor C) x x'),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (pr12 f) (H (pr1 x)))
     (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (# H (pr1 f))))
  (γ x') =
nat_trans_comp (γ x)
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker (pr12 f) (pr1 x))
        (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (pr1 f))))
Hyptriangle: ∏ a : C ⟶ D',
nat_trans_comp
  (γ (a, PointedFunctors.id_Ptd C))
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker
              (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
                 (make_nat_z_iso
                    (functor_identity C)
                    (functor_identity C)
                    (nat_trans_id
                       (functor_identity_data
                       C))
                    (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                       (functor_identity_data
                       C)))) a)
           (pre_whisker
              (functor_identity_data C)
              (nat_trans_id a)))
        (nat_trans_id a))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker
        (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
           (make_nat_z_iso
              (functor_identity C)
              (functor_identity C)
              (nat_trans_id
                 (functor_identity_data
                    C))
              (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                 (functor_identity_data
                    C)))) 
        (H a))
     (pre_whisker
        (functor_identity_data C)
        (nat_trans_id (H a))))
  (nat_trans_id (H a))

(v w : PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id

           (pr1 w)
