              (pr1 v) (H a))))
     (nat_trans_comp

     (a,

     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 w)
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 v) a)))
        (nat_trans_comp

                 (functor_composite_data

v: ptdendo
f1, f2: [C, D']
β: [C, D'] ⟦ f1, f2 ⟧
x: C
Hypnatinst: pr1 (# H β) (pr1 (pr1 v) x)
· γ (f2,, v) x =
γ (f1,, v) x
· # H
    (nat_trans_comp
       (nat_trans_id
          (functor_composite_data
             (PointedFunctors.functor_from_ptd_obj
                C v) f1))
       (pre_whisker (pr1 v) β)) x
?b = γ (f1,, v) x · # H (pre_whisker (pr1 v) β) x

H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H

           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))

        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data

              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data

        (functor_composite_data

H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data

     (pair_functor_data H

              (pair_functor_data

                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))

        (functor_composite_data

        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data

                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))

Hyppentagon: ∏ (a : C ⟶ D')
(v w : PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C),

                 (pr1 w)

C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)

  (nat_trans_id (H a))

f: [C, D']
α: ptdendo ⟦ v1, v2 ⟧

       (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D') f v1 v2 α)

H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))

(f : precategory_binproduct_mor
       (hom_ob_mor C D')
       (PointedFunctors.ptd_ob_mor C) x x'),

     (post_whisker (pr12 f) (H (pr1 x)))

  (γ x') =

nat_trans_comp
  (γ (a, PointedFunctors.id_Ptd C))
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker
              (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
                 (make_nat_z_iso
                    (functor_identity C)
                    (functor_identity C)
                    (nat_trans_id
                       (functor_identity_data
                       C))
                    (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                       (functor_identity_data

           (pre_whisker
              (functor_identity_data C)
              (nat_trans_id a)))
        (nat_trans_id a))) =

  (nat_trans_comp

              (nat_trans_id
                 (functor_identity_data

              (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                 (functor_identity_data

        (H a))
     (pre_whisker
        (functor_identity_data C)
        (nat_trans_id (H a))))
  (nat_trans_id (H a))

(v w : PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data 
           (pr1 w)
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 v) (H a))))
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_trans_id
              (functor_composite_data

           (nat_trans_id (H a)))))
  (γ
     (a,
     PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose

        (post_whisker
           (nat_trans_id

     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 w)
              (functor_composite_data

                    (pr1 w) 
                    (pr1 v))) a)
           (pre_whisker
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 w) 
                 (pr1 v))
              (nat_trans_id a)))))

           (pr1 f0))))

                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)

(f : precategory_binproduct_mor
       (hom_ob_mor C D')
       (PointedFunctors.ptd_ob_mor C) x x'),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (pr12 f) (H (pr1 x)))
     (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (# H (pr1 f))))
  (γ x') =
nat_trans_comp (γ x)

     (nat_trans_comp

nat_trans_comp

  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker
              (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
                 (make_nat_z_iso
                    (functor_identity C)
                    (functor_identity C)
                    (nat_trans_id
                       (functor_identity_data
                       C))
                    (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                       (functor_identity_data
                       C)))) a)
           (pre_whisker
              (functor_identity_data C)
              (nat_trans_id a)))
        (nat_trans_id a))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp

           (make_nat_z_iso
              (functor_identity C)

              (nat_trans_id
                 (functor_identity_data

                 (functor_identity_data

     (pre_whisker
        (functor_identity_data C)
        (nat_trans_id (H a))))
  (nat_trans_id (H a))

(v w : PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data 
           (pr1 w)
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 v) (H a))))
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_trans_id
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 w) 
                 (pr1 v))) 
           (H a))
        (pre_whisker
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 w) (pr1 v))
           (nat_trans_id (H a)))))
  (γ
     (a,
     PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose
       C w v)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_trans_id
              (PointedFunctors.functor_from_ptd_obj
                 C w)) (pr1 v ∙ H a))
        (pre_whisker (pr1 w) (γ (a, v))))
     (γ (pr1 v ∙ a, w)))
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 w)
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 v) a)))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker
              (nat_trans_id
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (pr1 w) 
                    (pr1 v))) a)
           (pre_whisker
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 w) 
                 (pr1 v))
              (nat_trans_id a)))))

f0 : precategory_binproduct_mor

nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (pr12 f0)
        (H (pr1 (f,, v1))))
     (pre_whisker (pr12 (f,, v2))
        (# H (pr1 f0))))

αbetter:= pr1 α,,
((λ c : C,
  toforallpaths
    (λ x : C, C ⟦ I_{ Mon_endo} x, pr1 v2 x ⟧)
    (pr1 (pr2 v1 · pr1 α)) 
    (pr12 v2) (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 α)) c
  :
  PointedFunctors.ptd_pt C v1 c · pr1 α c =
  PointedFunctors.ptd_pt C v2 c)
 :

          C v1
        ⟹ PointedFunctors.functor_from_ptd_obj

     (nat_trans_comp

pr1

              (pr1 (f,, v1)))
           (pre_whisker 
              (pr12 (f,, v2))
              (pr1 (id₁ f #, αbetter))))))
  x
# (pr1 (H f)) ((pr11 α) x) · γ (f,, v2) x =
γ (f,, v1) x · # H (post_whisker (pr1 α) f) x

H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))

       (PointedFunctors.ptd_ob_mor C) x x'),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (pr12 f) (H (pr1 x)))
     (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (# H (pr1 f))))
  (γ x') =
nat_trans_comp (γ x)

nat_trans_comp
  (γ (a, PointedFunctors.id_Ptd C))
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker
              (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
                 (make_nat_z_iso
                    (functor_identity C)
                    (functor_identity C)
                    (nat_trans_id
                       (functor_identity_data
                       C))
                    (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                       (functor_identity_data
                       C)))) a)
           (pre_whisker
              (functor_identity_data C)
              (nat_trans_id a)))
        (nat_trans_id a))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker

           (make_nat_z_iso
              (functor_identity C)

              (nat_trans_id
                 (functor_identity_data
                    C))
              (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                 (functor_identity_data
                    C)))) 
        (H a))
     (pre_whisker
        (functor_identity_data C)
        (nat_trans_id (H a))))
  (nat_trans_id (H a))

(v w : PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data

     (a,
     PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose
       C w v)) =

  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 w)
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 v) a)))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker
              (nat_trans_id
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (pr1 w) 
                    (pr1 v))) a)
           (pre_whisker
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 w) 
                 (pr1 v))
              (nat_trans_id a)))))

              (bindelta_functor_data

              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)
Hypnat: ∏ (x x' : C ⟶ D' × PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C)
(f : precategory_binproduct_mor
       (hom_ob_mor C D')
       (PointedFunctors.ptd_ob_mor C) x x'),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (pr12 f) (H (pr1 x)))
     (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (# H (pr1 f))))
  (γ x') =
nat_trans_comp (γ x)
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker (pr12 f) (pr1 x))
        (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (pr1 f))))
Hyptriangle: ∏ a : C ⟶ D',
nat_trans_comp
  (γ (a, PointedFunctors.id_Ptd C))
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker
              (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
                 (make_nat_z_iso
                    (functor_identity C)
                    (functor_identity C)
                    (nat_trans_id
                       (functor_identity_data
                       C))
                    (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                       (functor_identity_data
                       C)))) a)
           (pre_whisker
              (functor_identity_data C)
              (nat_trans_id a)))
        (nat_trans_id a))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker
        (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
           (make_nat_z_iso
              (functor_identity C)
              (functor_identity C)
              (nat_trans_id
                 (functor_identity_data
                    C))
              (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                 (functor_identity_data
                    C)))) 
        (H a))
     (pre_whisker
        (functor_identity_data C)
        (nat_trans_id (H a))))
  (nat_trans_id (H a))
Hyppentagon: ∏ (a : C ⟶ D')
(v w : PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data 
           (pr1 w)
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 v) (H a))))
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_trans_id
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 w) 
                 (pr1 v))) 
           (H a))
        (pre_whisker
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 w) (pr1 v))
           (nat_trans_id (H a)))))
  (γ
     (a,
     PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose
       C w v)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_trans_id
              (PointedFunctors.functor_from_ptd_obj
                 C w)) (pr1 v ∙ H a))
        (pre_whisker (pr1 w) (γ (a, v))))
     (γ (pr1 v ∙ a, w)))
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 w)
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 v) a)))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker
              (nat_trans_id
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (pr1 w) 
                    (pr1 v))) a)
           (pre_whisker
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 w) 
                 (pr1 v))
              (nat_trans_id a)))))
preserves_actor Mon_ptdendo
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H
  (λ (v : ∑ x : C ⟶ C, functor_identity_data C ⟹ x)
   (f : C ⟶ D'), γ (f,, v))
 
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)
Hypnat: ∏ (x x' : C ⟶ D' × PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C)
(f : precategory_binproduct_mor
       (hom_ob_mor C D')
       (PointedFunctors.ptd_ob_mor C) x x'),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (pr12 f) (H (pr1 x)))
     (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (# H (pr1 f))))
  (γ x') =
nat_trans_comp (γ x)
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker (pr12 f) (pr1 x))
        (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (pr1 f))))
Hyppentagon: ∏ (a : C ⟶ D')
(v w : PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data 
           (pr1 w)
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 v) (H a))))
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_trans_id
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 w) 
                 (pr1 v))) 
           (H a))
        (pre_whisker
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 w) (pr1 v))
           (nat_trans_id (H a)))))
  (γ
     (a,
     PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose
       C w v)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_trans_id
              (PointedFunctors.functor_from_ptd_obj
                 C w)) (pr1 v ∙ H a))
        (pre_whisker (pr1 w) (γ (a, v))))
     (γ (pr1 v ∙ a, w)))
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 w)
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 v) a)))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker
              (nat_trans_id
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (pr1 w) 
                    (pr1 v))) a)
           (pre_whisker
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 w) 
                 (pr1 v))
              (nat_trans_id a)))))
preserves_actor Mon_ptdendo
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H
  (λ (v : ∑ x : C ⟶ C, functor_identity_data C ⟹ x)
   (f : C ⟶ D'), γ (f,, v))

γ: nat_trans_data

v, w: ptdendo
f: [C, D']
γ
  (f,,
   WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
     Mon_ptdendo v w)
· # H
    (actegory_actordata
       (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D') v w f) =
actegory_actordata (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) v w
  (H f)
· WhiskeredBifunctors.leftwhiskering_on_morphisms
    (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) v
    (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
       (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) w (H f))
    (H
       (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
          (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D') w f))
    (γ (f,, w))
· γ
    (WhiskeredBifunctors.bifunctor_on_objects
       (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D') w f,, v)

H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data

     (functor_composite_data

     (functor_composite_data

(v w : PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data 
           (pr1 w)

              (pr1 v) (H a))))

v, w: ptdendo
f: [C, D']
nat_trans_comp
  (γ
     (f,,
      pr1 v ∙ pr1 w,,
      nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker (pr2 v) (functor_identity C))
           (pre_whisker (pr1 v) (pr2 w)))))
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_trans_id
              (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (pr1 w)))
           f)
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (pr1 w))
              f)))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_trans_id
              (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (pr1 w)))
           (H f))
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (pr1 w))
              (H f))))
     (pre_whisker (pr1 v) (γ (f,, w))))
  (γ (pr1 w ∙ f,, v))

  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 w)
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 v) a)))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker
              (nat_trans_id
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (pr1 w) 
                    (pr1 v))) a)
           (pre_whisker
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 w) 
                 (pr1 v))
              (nat_trans_id a)))))
v, w: ptdendo
f: [C, D']
∏ x : C,
nat_trans_comp
  (γ
     (f,,
      pr1 v ∙ pr1 w,,
      nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker (pr2 v) (functor_identity C))
           (pre_whisker (pr1 v) (pr2 w)))))
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (pr1 w))
              f))
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (pr1 w))
              f)))) x =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (pr1 w))
              (H f)))
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (pr1 w))
              (H f))))
     (pre_whisker (pr1 v) (γ (f,, w))))
  (γ (pr1 w ∙ f,, v)) x

         
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)

(f : precategory_binproduct_mor
       (hom_ob_mor C D')
       (PointedFunctors.ptd_ob_mor C) x x'),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (pr12 f) (H (pr1 x)))
     (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (# H (pr1 f))))
  (γ x') =
nat_trans_comp (γ x)
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker (pr12 f) (pr1 x))
        (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (pr1 f))))

     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 w)
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 v) a)))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker
              (nat_trans_id

                    (pr1 w) 
                    (pr1 v))) a)
           (pre_whisker
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 w) 
                 (pr1 v))
              (nat_trans_id a)))))

     (post_whisker (pr12 f) (H (pr1 x)))
     (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (# H (pr1 f))))
  (γ x') =
nat_trans_comp (γ x)
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker (pr12 f) (pr1 x))
        (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (pr1 f))))
v, w: ptdendo
f: [C, D']
x: C
?b = γ (pr1 w ∙ f,, v) x
 apply id_right. 
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)
Hypnat: ∏ (x x' : C ⟶ D' × PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C)
(f : precategory_binproduct_mor
       (hom_ob_mor C D')
       (PointedFunctors.ptd_ob_mor C) x x'),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (pr12 f) (H (pr1 x)))
     (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (# H (pr1 f))))
  (γ x') =
nat_trans_comp (γ x)
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker (pr12 f) (pr1 x))
        (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (pr1 f))))
v, w: ptdendo
f: [C, D']
x: C
γ (pr1 w ∙ f, v) x
· (pr1
     (# H (id₁ (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w) ∙ f)))
     x
   · # H
       (nat_trans_comp
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_composite_data (pr1 v)
                   (pr1 w)) f))
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_composite_data (pr1 v)
                   (pr1 w)) f))) x) =
γ (pr1 w ∙ f,, v) x · id₁ (H (pr1 v ∙ (pr1 w ∙ f)) x)

nat_trans_comp

     (post_whisker (pr12 f) (H (pr1 x)))

v, w: ptdendo
f: [C, D']
x: C
pr1 (# H (id₁ (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w) ∙ f)))
  x
· # H
    (nat_trans_comp
       (nat_trans_id
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (pr1 w))
             f))
       (nat_trans_id
          (functor_composite_data
             (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (pr1 w))
             f))) x = id₁ (H (pr1 v ∙ (pr1 w ∙ f)) x)

         (* only # H applied to identities remains *)
         
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data

                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data

           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data

       (PointedFunctors.ptd_ob_mor C) x x'),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (pr12 f) (H (pr1 x)))
     (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (# H (pr1 f))))
  (γ x') =

v, w: ptdendo
f: [C, D']
x: C
Hl1:= # H (id₁ (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w) ∙ f)): [C, D] ⟦ H (pr1 v ∙ (pr1 w · f)),
H (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w) ∙ f) ⟧
Hl2:= # H
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data 
              (pr1 v) (pr1 w)) f))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data 
              (pr1 v) (pr1 w)) f))): functor_precategory_ob_mor C D
⟦ H ((pr1 v ∙ pr1 w) ∙ f),
H (pr1 v ∙ (pr1 w ∙ f)) ⟧
pr1 Hl1 x · Hl2 x = id₁ (H (pr1 v ∙ (pr1 w ∙ f)) x)

f: [C, D']
x: C
Hl1:= # H (id₁ (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w) ∙ f)): [C, D] ⟦ H (pr1 v ∙ (pr1 w · f)),
H (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w) ∙ f) ⟧
Hl2:= # H
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data 
              (pr1 v) (pr1 w)) f))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data 
              (pr1 v) (pr1 w)) f))): functor_precategory_ob_mor C D
⟦ H ((pr1 v ∙ pr1 w) ∙ f),
H (pr1 v ∙ (pr1 w ∙ f)) ⟧
x': C
(id₁ (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w) ∙ f)
 · nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (pr1 w)) f))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (pr1 w)) f)))
  x' = id₁ (pr1 v ∙ (pr1 w · f)) x'

           
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)

(f : precategory_binproduct_mor
       (hom_ob_mor C D')
       (PointedFunctors.ptd_ob_mor C) x x'),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (pr12 f) (H (pr1 x)))
     (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (# H (pr1 f))))
  (γ x') =
nat_trans_comp (γ x)
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker (pr12 f) (pr1 x))
        (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (pr1 f))))
v, w: ptdendo
f: [C, D']
x: C
Hl1:= # H (id₁ (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w) ∙ f)): [C, D] ⟦ H (pr1 v ∙ (pr1 w · f)),
H (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w) ∙ f) ⟧
Hl2:= # H
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data 
              (pr1 v) (pr1 w)) f))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data 
              (pr1 v) (pr1 w)) f))): functor_precategory_ob_mor C D
⟦ H ((pr1 v ∙ pr1 w) ∙ f),
H (pr1 v ∙ (pr1 w ∙ f)) ⟧
x': C
id₁ (f (pr1 w (pr1 v x')))
· (id₁ (f (pr1 w (pr1 v x')))
   · id₁ (f (pr1 w (pr1 v x')))) =
id₁ (f (pr1 w (pr1 v x')))

H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data

                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data

           hcomp_functor_data)) H)
Hypnat: ∏ (x x' : C ⟶ D' × PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C)
(f : precategory_binproduct_mor
       (hom_ob_mor C D')
       (PointedFunctors.ptd_ob_mor C) x x'),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (pr12 f) (H (pr1 x)))
     (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (# H (pr1 f))))
  (γ x') =
nat_trans_comp (γ x)
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker (pr12 f) (pr1 x))
        (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (pr1 f))))
v, w: ptdendo
f: [C, D']
x: C
Hl1:= # H (id₁ (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w) ∙ f)): [C, D] ⟦ H (pr1 v ∙ (pr1 w · f)),
H (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w) ∙ f) ⟧
Hl2:= # H
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data 
              (pr1 v) (pr1 w)) f))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data 
              (pr1 v) (pr1 w)) f))): functor_precategory_ob_mor C D
⟦ H ((pr1 v ∙ pr1 w) ∙ f),
H (pr1 v ∙ (pr1 w ∙ f)) ⟧
aux5: Hl1 · Hl2 = id₁ (H (pr1 v ∙ (pr1 w · f)))
pr1 Hl1 x · Hl2 x = id₁ (H (pr1 v ∙ (pr1 w ∙ f)) x)

         exact (toforallpaths _ _ _ (maponpaths pr1 aux5) x).
       
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))

                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)

(f : precategory_binproduct_mor
       (hom_ob_mor C D')
       (PointedFunctors.ptd_ob_mor C) x x'),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (pr12 f) (H (pr1 x)))
     (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (# H (pr1 f))))
  (γ x') =
nat_trans_comp (γ x)
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker (pr12 f) (pr1 x))
        (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (pr1 f))))
Hyptriangle: ∏ a : C ⟶ D',
nat_trans_comp
  (γ (a, PointedFunctors.id_Ptd C))
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker
              (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
                 (make_nat_z_iso
                    (functor_identity C)
                    (functor_identity C)
                    (nat_trans_id
                       (functor_identity_data
                       C))
                    (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                       (functor_identity_data
                       C)))) a)
           (pre_whisker
              (functor_identity_data C)
              (nat_trans_id a)))
        (nat_trans_id a))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker
        (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
           (make_nat_z_iso
              (functor_identity C)
              (functor_identity C)
              (nat_trans_id
                 (functor_identity_data
                    C))
              (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                 (functor_identity_data
                    C)))) 
        (H a))
     (pre_whisker
        (functor_identity_data C)
        (nat_trans_id (H a))))
  (nat_trans_id (H a))
Hyppentagon: ∏ (a : C ⟶ D')
(v w : PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data 
           (pr1 w)
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 v) (H a))))
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_trans_id
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 w) 
                 (pr1 v))) 
           (H a))
        (pre_whisker
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 w) (pr1 v))
           (nat_trans_id (H a)))))
  (γ
     (a,
     PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose
       C w v)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_trans_id
              (PointedFunctors.functor_from_ptd_obj
                 C w)) (pr1 v ∙ H a))
        (pre_whisker (pr1 w) (γ (a, v))))
     (γ (pr1 v ∙ a, w)))
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (pr1 w)
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 v) a)))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker
              (nat_trans_id
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (pr1 w) 
                    (pr1 v))) a)
           (pre_whisker
              (functor_composite_data
                 (pr1 w) 
                 (pr1 v))
              (nat_trans_id a)))))
preserves_unitor Mon_ptdendo
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H
  (λ (v : ∑ x : C ⟶ C, functor_identity_data C ⟹ x)
   (f : C ⟶ D'), γ (f,, v))

  (functor_composite_data

nat_trans_comp

                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)
Hypnat: ∏ (x x' : C ⟶ D' × PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C)
(f : precategory_binproduct_mor
       (hom_ob_mor C D')
       (PointedFunctors.ptd_ob_mor C) x x'),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker (pr12 f) (H (pr1 x)))
     (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (# H (pr1 f))))
  (γ x') =
nat_trans_comp (γ x)
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker (pr12 f) (pr1 x))
        (pre_whisker (pr12 x') (pr1 f))))
f: [C, D']
x: C
# H
  (id₁ (functor_compose (functor_identity C) f)
   · id₁ f) x =
# H
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
              (make_nat_z_iso (functor_identity C)
                 (functor_identity C)
                 (nat_trans_id
                    (functor_identity_data C))
                 (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                    (functor_identity_data C)))) f)
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_identity_data C) f)))
     (nat_trans_id f)) x

C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)
lineator_laxlaws Mon_ptdendo
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H
  (λ (v : ∑ x : C ⟶ C, functor_identity_data C ⟹ x)
   (f : C ⟶ D'), γ (f,, v))
→ ∑
  _ : is_nat_trans
        (functor_composite_data
           (pair_functor_data H
              (functor_identity
                 (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data
                    C)))
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data
                 (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
                 (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (bindelta_functor_data
                       (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
                    (pair_functor_data
                       (pr2_functor (hom C D)
                          (hom C C))
                       (pr1_functor (hom C D)
                          (hom C C))))
                 hcomp_functor_data)))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (pair_functor_data
                 (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
                 (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
              (functor_composite_data
                 (functor_composite_data
                    (bindelta_functor_data
                       (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
                    (pair_functor_data
                       (pr2_functor (hom C D')
                          (hom C C))
                       (pr1_functor (hom C D')
                          (hom C C))))
                 hcomp_functor_data)) H) γ,
  (∏ a : C ⟶ D',
   nat_trans_comp (γ (a, PointedFunctors.id_Ptd C))
     (# H
        (nat_trans_comp
           (nat_trans_comp
              (post_whisker
                 (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
                    (make_nat_z_iso
                       (functor_identity C)
                       (functor_identity C)
                       (nat_trans_id
                          (functor_identity_data C))
                       (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                          (functor_identity_data C))))
                 a)
              (pre_whisker (functor_identity_data C)
                 (nat_trans_id a))) (nat_trans_id a))) =
   nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
              (make_nat_z_iso (functor_identity C)
                 (functor_identity C)
                 (nat_trans_id
                    (functor_identity_data C))
                 (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                    (functor_identity_data C)))) (H a))
        (pre_whisker (functor_identity_data C)
           (nat_trans_id (H a)))) (nat_trans_id (H a)))
  × (∏ (a : C ⟶ D') (v w : PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C),
     nat_trans_comp
       (nat_trans_comp
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (H a))))
          (nat_trans_comp
             (post_whisker
                (nat_trans_id
                   (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                      (pr1 v))) (H a))
             (pre_whisker
                (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                   (pr1 v)) (nat_trans_id (H a)))))
       (γ
          (a,
          PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C w v)) =
     nat_trans_comp
       (nat_trans_comp
          (nat_trans_comp
             (post_whisker
                (nat_trans_id
                   (PointedFunctors.functor_from_ptd_obj
                      C w)) (pr1 v ∙ H a))
             (pre_whisker (pr1 w) (γ (a, v))))
          (γ (pr1 v ∙ a, w)))
       (# H
          (nat_trans_comp
             (nat_trans_id
                (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                   (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) a)))
             (nat_trans_comp
                (post_whisker
                   (nat_trans_id
                      (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                         (pr1 v))) a)
                (pre_whisker
                   (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                      (pr1 v)) (nat_trans_id a))))))

           (nat_trans_comp

              (pair_functor_data

                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))

f2: hom_data C D'
v2: PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C
β: hom_data C D' ⟦ pr1 (f1,, v1), pr1 (f2,, v2) ⟧
α: PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C
⟦ pr2 (f1,, v1), pr2 (f2,, v2) ⟧
Hypnatleftinst: nat_trans_comp
  (pre_whisker (pr1 v2) (# H β))
  (γ (f2,, v2)) =
nat_trans_comp (γ (f1,, v2))
  (# H (pre_whisker (pr1 v2) β))
αbetter:= ?Goal1: ptdendo ⟦ v1, v2 ⟧
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp (post_whisker (pr1 α) (H f1))
     (pre_whisker (pr1 v2) (# H β))) 
  (γ (f2,, v2)) =
nat_trans_comp (γ (f1,, v1))
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp 
        (post_whisker (pr1 α) f1)
        (pre_whisker (pr1 v2) β)))

∏ x : C, nat_trans_comp (pr2 v1) (pr1 α) x = pr2 v2 x
 
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data

           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))

                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)

v2: PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C

⟦ pr2 (f1,, v1), pr2 (f2,, v2) ⟧
Hypnatleftinst: nat_trans_comp
  (pre_whisker (pr1 v2) (# H β))
  (γ (f2,, v2)) =
nat_trans_comp (γ (f1,, v2))
  (# H (pre_whisker (pr1 v2) β))
αbetter:= pr1 α,,
(nat_trans_eq C (functor_identity_data C)
   (pr1 v2) (nat_trans_comp (pr2 v1) (pr1 α))
   (pr2 v2)
   (λ c : C,
    pr2 α c
    :
    nat_trans_comp (pr2 v1) (pr1 α) c =
    pr2 v2 c)
 :
 (λ f : endofrombicat ⟦ pr1 v1, pr1 v2 ⟧,
  Core.mor_disp (pr2 v1) (pr2 v2) f) 
   (pr1 α)): ptdendo ⟦ v1, v2 ⟧
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp (post_whisker (pr1 α) (H f1))
     (pre_whisker (pr1 v2) (# H β))) (γ (f2,, v2)) =
nat_trans_comp (γ (f1,, v1))
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp (post_whisker (pr1 α) f1)
        (pre_whisker (pr1 v2) β)))

       (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors
          D') f1 v1 v2 αbetter)

γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data

     (functor_composite_data

  (λ (v : ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
          functor_identity_data C ⟹ x)
   (f : C ⟶ D'), γ (f,, v))
∏ a : C ⟶ D',
nat_trans_comp (γ (a, PointedFunctors.id_Ptd C))
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker
              (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
                 (make_nat_z_iso (functor_identity C)
                    (functor_identity C)
                    (nat_trans_id
                       (functor_identity_data C))
                    (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                       (functor_identity_data C)))) a)
           (pre_whisker (functor_identity_data C)
              (nat_trans_id a))) (nat_trans_id a))) =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (post_whisker
        (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
           (make_nat_z_iso (functor_identity C)
              (functor_identity C)
              (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
              (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                 (functor_identity_data C)))) (H a))
     (pre_whisker (functor_identity_data C)
        (nat_trans_id (H a)))) (nat_trans_id (H a))

              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)
Hypunitor: preserves_unitor Mon_ptdendo
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H
  (λ (v : ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
          functor_identity_data C ⟹ x)
   (f : C ⟶ D'), γ (f,, v))
f: C ⟶ D'
x: C
# H
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
              (make_nat_z_iso (functor_identity C)
                 (functor_identity C)
                 (nat_trans_id
                    (functor_identity_data C))
                 (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                    (functor_identity_data C)))) f)
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_identity_data C) f)))
     (nat_trans_id f)) x =
# H
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_identity_data C) f))
     (nat_trans_id f)) x

         (* only # H applied to identities remains *)
         (* match goal with | [ |- _ = _ ?r _ ] => set (Hr := r) end. *)
         
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)

   (f : C ⟶ D'), γ (f,, v))
f: C ⟶ D'
x: C
aux3:= # H
  (id₁ (functor_compose (functor_identity C) f)
   · id₁ f): [C, D]
⟦ H (functor_compose (functor_identity C) f),
H f ⟧
# H
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_z_iso_to_trans_inv
              (make_nat_z_iso (functor_identity C)
                 (functor_identity C)
                 (nat_trans_id
                    (functor_identity_data C))
                 (is_nat_z_iso_nat_trans_id
                    (functor_identity_data C)))) f)
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_identity_data C) f)))
     (nat_trans_id f)) x =
# H
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_identity_data C) f))
     (nat_trans_id f)) x

argtoH:= nat_trans_comp

C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))

  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H
  (λ (v : ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
          functor_identity_data C ⟹ x)
   (f : C ⟶ D'), γ (f,, v))
Hypnatright: lineator_nat_right Mon_ptdendo
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H
  (λ (v : ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
          functor_identity_data C ⟹ x)
   (f : C ⟶ D'), γ (f,, v))
Hypactor: preserves_actor Mon_ptdendo
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H
  (λ (v : ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
          functor_identity_data C ⟹ x)
   (f : C ⟶ D'), γ (f,, v))
Hypunitor: preserves_unitor Mon_ptdendo
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H
  (λ (v : ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
          functor_identity_data C ⟹ x)
   (f : C ⟶ D'), γ (f,, v))
∏ (a : C ⟶ D') (v w : PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C),
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
           (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (H a))))
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_trans_id
              (functor_composite_data (pr1 w) (pr1 v)))
           (H a))
        (pre_whisker
           (functor_composite_data (pr1 w) (pr1 v))
           (nat_trans_id (H a)))))
  (γ (a, PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C w v)) =
nat_trans_comp
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker
           (nat_trans_id
              (PointedFunctors.functor_from_ptd_obj C
                 w)) (pr1 v ∙ H a))
        (pre_whisker (pr1 w) (γ (a, v))))
     (γ (pr1 v ∙ a, w)))
  (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
              (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) a)))
        (nat_trans_comp
           (post_whisker
              (nat_trans_id
                 (functor_composite_data (pr1 w)
                    (pr1 v))) a)
           (pre_whisker
              (functor_composite_data (pr1 w) (pr1 v))
              (nat_trans_id a)))))

        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data

Hypactor: preserves_actor Mon_ptdendo
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H
  (λ (v : ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
          functor_identity_data C ⟹ x)
   (f : C ⟶ D'), γ (f,, v))
f: C ⟶ D'
w, v: PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C
x: C
γ (f, PointedFunctorsComposition.ptd_compose C v w) x
· id₁ (H (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w) ∙ f) x) =
γ
  (f,,
   pr1 v ∙ pr1 w,,
   nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id (functor_identity_data C))
     (nat_trans_comp
        (post_whisker (pr2 v) (functor_identity C))
        (pre_whisker (pr1 v) (pr2 w)))) x
· (# H
     (nat_trans_comp
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (pr1 w))
              f))
        (nat_trans_id
           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (pr1 w))
              f))) x
   · # H
       (nat_trans_comp
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_composite_data (pr1 v)
                (functor_composite_data (pr1 w) f)))
          (nat_trans_comp
             (nat_trans_id
                (functor_composite_data
                   (functor_composite_data (pr1 v)
                      (pr1 w)) f))
             (nat_trans_id
                (functor_composite_data
                   (functor_composite_data (pr1 v)
                      (pr1 w)) f)))) x)

              f))

           (functor_composite_data
              (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (pr1 w))
              f))) x
   · # H
       (nat_trans_comp
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_composite_data (pr1 v)
                (functor_composite_data (pr1 w) f)))
          (nat_trans_comp
             (nat_trans_id
                (functor_composite_data
                   (functor_composite_data (pr1 v)
                      (pr1 w)) f))
             (nat_trans_id
                (functor_composite_data
                   (functor_composite_data (pr1 v)
                      (pr1 w)) f)))) x)

         
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)
Hypactor: preserves_actor Mon_ptdendo
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H
  (λ (v : ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
          functor_identity_data C ⟹ x)
   (f : C ⟶ D'), γ (f,, v))
f: C ⟶ D'
w, v: PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C
x: C
id₁ (H (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w) ∙ f) x) =
# H
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (pr1 w)) f))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (pr1 w)) f)))
  x
· # H
    (nat_trans_comp
       (nat_trans_id
          (functor_composite_data (pr1 v)
             (functor_composite_data (pr1 w) f)))
       (nat_trans_comp
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_composite_data (pr1 v)
                   (pr1 w)) f))
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_composite_data (pr1 v)
                   (pr1 w)) f)))) x

         (* only # H applied to identities remains *)
         (* match goal with |[ |- _  = _ · ?f ] => set (Hf := f) end. *)

H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data

     (pair_functor_data H

     (functor_composite_data

  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H
  (λ (v : ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
          functor_identity_data C ⟹ x)
   (f : C ⟶ D'), γ (f,, v))
f: C ⟶ D'
w, v: PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C
x: C
aux5':= pr1
  (# H
     (id₁ (pr1 v ∙ (pr1 w ∙ f))
      · (id₁ ((pr1 v ∙ pr1 w) ∙ f)
         · id₁
             (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w)
              ∙ f)))) x: D ⟦ H (pr1 v ∙ (pr1 w ∙ f)) x,
H (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w) ∙ f) x ⟧
id₁ (H (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w) ∙ f) x) =
# H
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (pr1 w)) f))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data (pr1 v) (pr1 w)) f)))
  x
· # H
    (nat_trans_comp
       (nat_trans_id
          (functor_composite_data (pr1 v)
             (functor_composite_data (pr1 w) f)))
       (nat_trans_comp
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_composite_data (pr1 v)
                   (pr1 w)) f))
          (nat_trans_id
             (functor_composite_data
                (functor_composite_data (pr1 v)
                   (pr1 w)) f)))) x

         (* assert (auxH : Hf = aux5').
         { apply idpath. } *)

· pr1
    (# H (id₁ (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w) ∙ f)))
    x =
id₁ (H (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w) ∙ f) x)

         
C, D, D': category
H: [C, D'] ⟶ [C, D]
γ: nat_trans_data
  (functor_composite_data
     (pair_functor_data H
        (functor_identity
           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)
Hypactor: preserves_actor Mon_ptdendo
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H
  (λ (v : ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
          functor_identity_data C ⟹ x)
   (f : C ⟶ D'), γ (f,, v))
f: C ⟶ D'
w, v: PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C
x: C
Hl1:= # H
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data 
              (pr1 v) (pr1 w)) f))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data 
              (pr1 v) (pr1 w)) f))): functor_precategory_ob_mor C D
⟦ H ((pr1 v ∙ pr1 w) ∙ f),
H (pr1 v ∙ (pr1 w ∙ f)) ⟧
Hl2:= # H (id₁ (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w) ∙ f)): [C, D] ⟦ H (pr1 v ∙ (pr1 w ∙ f)),
H (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w) ∙ f) ⟧
Hl1 x · pr1 Hl2 x =
id₁ (H (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w) ∙ f) x)

         (* It looked like being stuck. One cannot proceed as in the opposite direction stating aux7: Hl1 · Hl2 = identity _ because this does not type-check.

  (nat_trans_comp

x: C
Hl1:= # H
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data

     (nat_trans_id

x: C

· id₁ (f (pr1 w (pr1 v x')))

id₁ (f (pr1 w (pr1 v x')))

           (PointedFunctors.ptd_precategory_data C)))
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D) (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)))
  (functor_composite_data
     (functor_composite_data
        (pair_functor_data
           (functor_identity (hom_data C D'))
           (functor_ptd_forget_alt C))
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data
              (bindelta_functor_data
                 (hom C D' ⊠ hom C C))
              (pair_functor_data
                 (pr2_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))
                 (pr1_functor (hom C D') (hom C C))))
           hcomp_functor_data)) H)
Hypactor: preserves_actor Mon_ptdendo
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
  (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) H
  (λ (v : ∑ x : C ⟶ C,
          functor_identity_data C ⟹ x)
   (f : C ⟶ D'), γ (f,, v))
f: C ⟶ D'
w, v: PointedFunctors.ptd_obj C
x: C
Hl1:= # H
  (nat_trans_comp
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data 
              (pr1 v) (pr1 w)) f))
     (nat_trans_id
        (functor_composite_data
           (functor_composite_data 
              (pr1 v) (pr1 w)) f))): functor_precategory_ob_mor C D
⟦ H ((pr1 v ∙ pr1 w) ∙ f),
H (pr1 v ∙ (pr1 w ∙ f)) ⟧
Hl2:= # H (id₁ (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w) ∙ f)): [C, D] ⟦ H (pr1 v ∙ (pr1 w ∙ f)),
H (functor_compose (pr1 v) (pr1 w) ∙ f) ⟧
x': C
id₁ (f (pr1 w (pr1 v x')))
· id₁ (f (pr1 w (pr1 v x'))) =
id₁ (f (pr1 w (pr1 v x')))

         apply id_left.
 Defined.

End AA.


 
C, D, D': category
Signature C D D'
≃ hom ([C, D'],, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
    ([C, D],, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D)

 
C, D, D': category
Signature C D D'
≃ hom ([C, D'],, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
    ([C, D],, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D)

   
C, D, D': category
actionbased_strong_functor Mon_endo'
  (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C D')
  (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C D)
≃ hom ([C, D'],, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
    ([C, D],, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D)

   
C, D, D': category
∏ x : hom C D' ⟶ hom C D,
actionbased_strength Mon_endo'
  (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C D')
  (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C D)
  x
≃ Core.mor_disp
    (pr2 ([C, D'],, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D'))
    (pr2 ([C, D],, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D)) x

   
C, D, D': category
H: hom C D' ⟶ hom C D
actionbased_strength Mon_endo'
  (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.domain_action C D')
  (ActionBasedStrengthOnHomsInBicat.target_action C D)
  H
≃ Core.mor_disp
    (pr2 ([C, D'],, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D'))
    (pr2 ([C, D],, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D)) H

   apply weqABStrengthLaxMorphismActegories.
 Defined.

 
C, D, D': category
Signature C D D'
≃ hom (hom C D',, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
    (hom C D,, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D)

 
C, D, D': category
Signature C D D'
≃ hom (hom C D',, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
    (hom C D,, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D)

   
C, D, D': category
hom ([C, D'],, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
  ([C, D],, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D)
≃ hom (hom C D',, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D')
    (hom C D,, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D)

   
C, D, D': category
∏
x : bicat_of_cats
    ⟦ pr1 ([C, D'],, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D'),
    pr1 ([C, D],, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) ⟧,
Core.mor_disp
  (pr2 ([C, D'],, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D'))
  (pr2 ([C, D],, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D)) x
≃ Core.mor_disp
    (pr2 (hom C D',, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D'))
    (pr2 (hom C D,, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D)) x

   
C, D, D': category
H: bicat_of_cats
⟦ pr1 ([C, D'],, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D'),
pr1 ([C, D],, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D) ⟧
Core.mor_disp
  (pr2 ([C, D'],, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D'))
  (pr2 ([C, D],, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D)) H
≃ Core.mor_disp
    (pr2 (hom C D',, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D'))
    (pr2 (hom C D,, actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D)) H

   exact (idweq _).
 Defined. (* slow *)

 (* a direct proof without going through weqSignatureLaxMorphismActegories:
 Lemma weqSignatureLaxMorphismActegories_alt_alt :
   Signature C D D' ≃ hom(C:=actbicat Mon_ptdendo) (hom(C:=bicat_of_cats) C D',,actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D') (hom(C:=bicat_of_cats) C D,,actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors D).
 Proof.
   apply (weqcomp weqSignatureABStrength).
   apply weqfibtototal.
   intro H.
   apply weqABStrengthLaxMorphismActegories. (* very slow *)
 Defined. (* very slow *)
*)

End A.

Section HomogeneousCase.

 Context (C : category).
 (** this part can be resurrected with some transparent proofs, or hopefully by moving to pointed tensorial strength that is not instantiated from bicategories *)
 (*
 Corollary weqSignatureLaxMorphismActegoriesHomogeneous :
   Signature C C C ≃ ∑ H : endofrombicat C ⟶ endofrombicat C, pointedtensorialstrength (Mon_endo C) H.
 Proof.
   eapply weqcomp.
   { apply weqSignatureLaxMorphismActegories_alt. }
   cbn.
   apply weqfibtototal.
   intro H.
   unfold pointedtensorialstrength.
   rewrite (actegoryPtdEndosOnFunctors_as_actegory_with_canonical_pointed_action C).
   apply idweq.
 Defined.

 Corollary weqSignatureLaxMorphismActegoriesHomogeneous_alt :
   Signature C C C ≃ ∑ H : [C, C] ⟶ [C, C], pointedtensorialstrength (Mon_endo C) H.
 Proof.
   cbn.
   apply (weqcomp weqSignatureLaxMorphismActegoriesHomogeneous).
   apply weqfibtototal.
   intro H.
   apply idweq.
 Defined.
  *)


End HomogeneousCase.
